pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly define and check this path.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic where this exact minimum file size requirement is enforced.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic where image width check is performed against this value.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic where image height check is performed against this value.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated DICOM series containing 6 slices of synthetic shapes, assigned PatientID 'GRID001'. The required output is a screenshot capturing a multi-tile layout saved to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/grid_layout.png. The verification logic checks that this screenshot is at least 10240 bytes in size and has minimum dimensions of 800x600 pixels.
